full_description: Use {a} to grab the bottles {A}, {B}, and {C} one by one and put them into the dustbin {D} to the right of the table.
schema: {A} is the first bottle, {B} the second, {C} the third. {D} is the dustbin. {a} is the single arm used to move all bottles into {D}.
preference: Num of words should not exceed 20. Degree of detail avg is 6.
